title: Europe cannot afford drift on China: time for a strategy that defends jobs and values [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe stands at a crossroads in its relationship with China: cling to fragmented responses, or forge a bold, unified strategy. As dependencies deepen and industries strain, defending jobs, values, and sovereignty demands urgent, decisive action now.
